subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him for whom God hath ordained a station of sublime glory, that he may hearken unto that which is uttered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اراد الله له مقام عز رفیع ان یسمع ما یننق
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God
